validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_number: Password must contain at least one number
validation.full_name_min: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.terms_required: You must agree to the terms and conditions

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the world of handmade crafts
login.branding_title: Support local artisans and beautify your home with unique pieces.
login.branding_subtitle: Min Baiti is your first destination for everything handmade with love.

signup.title: Create New Account
signup.subtitle: Join the largest community of artisans and creators in the region
signup.branding_subtitle: Join us to revive Arab heritage by supporting creative artisans and making their unique products accessible to every home.

hero.description: Discover the best products made with love and care, and support small business owners all in one place.
typed_strings: Homemade Food with a Classic Taste
Shop Easily and Support Someone's Dream

categories_section.label: Available Categories
categories_section.title: Discover Home Business Categories
categories_section.description: We provide an integrated platform bringing together the best home-based businesses in one place, making buying and selling easier and supporting small entrepreneurs. By choosing locally handcrafted products, you help grow a new business and turn ambition into sustainable success.

about_section.title: Together to Support Every Home Business and Turn Passion into Real Success
about_section.description: Our platform brings home business owners together in one place.

sell_section.tagline: Your chance to start your business from home
sell_section.title: List Your Products and Start Your Journey Now

accessories.title: Handmade Accessories
accessories.subtitle: Handcrafted accessories with modern designs that suit all tastes

candles.title: Scented Candles
candles.subtitle: Luxury candles with distinctive scents that create a warm and cozy atmosphere

cooking.title: Fresh Home Food
cooking.subtitle: The most delicious homemade dishes prepared with love and high quality

decore.title: Home Decor
decore.subtitle: Unique decorative pieces that add beauty and elegance to your home

macrame.title: Macrame & Crochet
macrame.subtitle: Handmade art pieces with macrame and crochet threads to add a warm touch to your home

footer.about_description: A platform dedicated to supporting Arab artisans and connecting them with handmade art lovers around the world. Every piece tells a story from our authentic heritage.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Be the first to know about new and exclusive pieces

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.subtitle: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Check the URL or return to the homepage.

about_section.title: Our Story Started with Passion
about_section.quote_suffix: with a simple dream: creating a safe and trusted space that brings together talented artisans and homemade food lovers with enthusiasts of quality and authenticity. We believe every piece tells a story of love and passion.

hero_about.tagline: From our homes to your heart

how_section.subtitle: We don't just provide a selling platform; we build a bridge connecting the warmth of homes with the ambition of artisans and lovers of authenticity.

cards.title: Empower Artisans
cards.description: We provide the technological tools and necessary training for every seller from their home, turning their innate talent into a sustainable and profitable business.

cards.title: Guarantee Highest Standards
cards.description: We are the bridge of trust; we review and monitor every handmade or homemade product to ensure a safe, clean, and high-quality shopping experience for the customer.

cards.title: Aim for Global Reach
cards.description: Our vision is to be the leading platform in the Middle East that makes 'Made at Home' a source of pride that conquers global markets and supports our local economy.

cards.title: Guaranteed Quality
cards.description: Every product undergoes a thorough inspection to ensure it meets our standards of cleanliness and craftsmanship.

cards.title: Community First
cards.description: By shopping here, you directly support artisan families and ambitious small businesses.

cards.title: Authenticity & Creativity
cards.description: Handcrafted pieces made with love, unlike anything you'll find in commercial markets.
